{{Quote|When the Empire's cantinas start serving deuterium-pyros, maybe I'll reconsider.|The Voidhound|<ref name="Star Wars: The Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Deuterium-pyro''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage. It was a favorite among ruffians, due to its terrible flavor and strong aftertaste.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Durdeutoriginal.png|thumb|left|100px|Deuterium-pyro's original appearance]]
In ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', some food and drink items like Deuterium-pyro got a new appearance after Publish 6, a publish which included a revamp to the Chef profession. The original appearance of Deuterium-pyro (and also [[Durindfire (beverage)|Durindfire]]) was that of a narrow white cylinder with a gray top. All Deuterium-pyros made before Publish 6 were retroactively changed to the new appearance. The original appearance could still be found in some locations such as [[The Ranch]] on Tatooine.<ref name="swg">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=item|Deuterium-pyro}}</ref>

{{Food-stub}}
